method_summary: This paper is a chapter discussing research challenges and opportunities in agentic AI reliability, focusing on topics like cascading failures, dynamic environments, and testing methodologies.
key_innovation: The paper synthesizes and outlines key research directions and challenges in the field of agentic AI reliability, rather than presenting a single novel technical method.
limitations_stated: The paper acknowledges that reliability mechanisms can be resource-intensive.
title: Looking Forward: Challenges and Opportunities in Agentic AI Reliability
